commit_scope: Tighten the full model inference composition receipt so per-device rows only claim what the observing host actually proved, and make Windows CI validate the known Windows gap explicitly.

commands: bin/form-cli ask "Windows full model inference composition receipt gap: how should the receipt distinguish native form-cli observed, GGUF model-cell not observed, dependency claim not proven, and full inference not composed?" -> native local RAG miss, staged model-call receipt observed, prose generation still pending
PROMPT_GATE_SKIP_CONTINUITY=1 make prompt-guide -> pass for branch codex/windows-composition-receipt-tighten-20260626 after recording sibling continuity blocker
jq -e local receipt assertions -> pass; hard_failed_count=0, macOS observed_now=true, Windows off-host row remains false
rg path-leak scan over durable receipt/trace -> no /Users, /private/var, or /var/folders paths found
results: Receipt observable_trace now separates failed_count, hard_failed_count, and nonhard_failed_count.
macOS row is conditioned by current_host and still observes fkwu form-cli, GGUF model-cell, Metal model-cell, and Metal body trace locally.
Windows row now carries gguf_model_cell=false, DirectML/D3D12 model-cell=false, and dependency_runtime_claim_proven=false unless the current host is Windows and proves otherwise.
Full model inference remains explicitly unclaimed.

commands: PR #3678 GitGuardian Security Checks -> pass in 1s
PR #3678 Windows Host Floor -> pass in 11m43s at https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/actions/runs/28246377314/job/83686325484

Windows Host Floor ran scripts/fkwu_form_cli_full_model_inference_composition_receipt.sh .cache/full-model-inference-composition-windows.json and jq-validated receipt kind, verdict, full_model_inference_composed=false, hard_failed_count=0, windows current_host/observed_now/fkwu_form_cli_native=true, windows gguf_model_cell=false, windows dependency_runtime_claim_proven=false, and windows full_model_inference=false
ci_validation.notes: The Windows workflow proved the tightened matrix shape on the runner without claiming full model inference.

deploy_validation.reason: No public deploy surface changed; this is a local/CI receipt contract and workflow assertion.

phase_gate.reason: Local receipt validation and Windows CI both pass for the tightened device matrix; full local model inference remains a separate open bridge, not a claim of this receipt task.

evidence_refs: Windows run 28226206577 showed the baseline receipt passed as a non-full-inference receipt, with Windows fkwu native observed but GGUF model-cell and runtime dependency proof not observed.
Form-first reasoning was attempted through bin/form-cli ask before rented analysis; local fkwu RAG returned no grounded/sufficient hit for this Windows receipt-shaping question.

Honest non-claims: Android had no authorized adb device here, Windows GGUF model-cell remains a CI-observed gap until proven, and full ask-staged local generation is still blocked by tokenizer-carrier, full-GGUF-weight-map-to-Metal, and autoregressive-loop-binding.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The receipt remains a non-full-inference composition receipt, while its device matrix now avoids off-host implication and Windows CI validates the exact observed Windows floor/gap state.
test_flows: Windows Host Floor jq assertions on .cache/full-model-inference-composition-windows.json

sovereignty_receipt.native_body_share: native/local proof commands generated the durable receipt, trace outputs, four-way Form bands, GGUF map witness, and Metal runtime observations
sovereignty_receipt.rented_oracle_share: the orchestration, script design, schema tightening, and summary were produced by the rented frontier model after form-cli ask returned a native miss

trust_matrix.path: native-first miss -> rented implementation orchestration -> native receipt proof
trust_matrix.grounded: receipt and proof steps are grounded in output files/digests; initial form-cli ask was not grounded
trust_matrix.suffic: sufficient for receipt honesty, not sufficient for full model inference
